title: Implementation-Grade Architecture for Public Conversational AI Chatbot
executive_summary: This architecture defines a secure, scalable, and compliant conversational AI chatbot similar to ChatGPT, built with Python FastAPI, PostgreSQL, and React, hosted on Microsoft Azure. It integrates GPT via secure API, enforces configurable data retention, and includes moderation, authentication, and observability. The design balances high-risk exposure with strong security and compliance controls while maintaining modularity and maintainability.
architecture_overview: The system follows a modular service-oriented architecture with distinct frontend, backend, data, and security layers. The frontend (React) communicates with a FastAPI backend via REST and WebSocket APIs. The backend comprises gateway, conversation, LLM proxy, user, and moderation services. PostgreSQL stores structured data, Redis provides caching, and Azure services handle hosting, secrets, and observability. The architecture enforces HTTPS, OAuth2/JWT authentication, and configurable data retention.

technology_stack.frontend: React + TypeScript + WebSocket for real-time chat
technology_stack.backend: Python FastAPI + Celery for background jobs
technology_stack.llm_integration: OpenAI GPT API via secure HTTPS

functional_feature_map.core_chat: Real-time conversational interface with GPT responses
functional_feature_map.analytics: Usage metrics, token tracking, and audit logs

system_components.frontend: React SPA with chat UI, accessibility compliance, and responsive design
system_components.gateway_service: Handles routing, rate limiting, and authentication
system_components.conversation_service: Manages chat sessions and message persistence
system_components.llm_proxy_service: Encapsulates GPT API calls with caching and fallback
system_components.moderation_service: Filters harmful content and manages abuse reports
system_components.data_layer: PostgreSQL for structured data, Redis for caching
system_components.observability_layer: Centralized logging, metrics, and tracing via Azure Monitor

workflows.chat_flow: User initiates chat → Gateway authenticates → Conversation service logs message → LLM proxy fetches GPT response → Moderation filters output → Response streamed to frontend.
workflows.authentication_flow: User logs in via OAuth2 → JWT issued → Token validated on each request → Role-based access enforced.
workflows.moderation_flow: Messages pass through moderation_service → Flagged content logged → Moderator review via dashboard.
workflows.data_retention_flow: Data stored with timestamp → Retention job purges or anonymizes after configured period → Audit logged.
workflows.incident_response_flow: Alert triggered → Security lead notified → Containment and forensic analysis → Post-incident review.

data_model.privacy_controls: PII separated from chat content; anonymization and pseudonymization applied.
data_model.retention_policy: Configurable (default 12 months); user opt-in for longer storage.
data_model.deletion_workflow: Soft delete followed by scheduled purge; GDPR/CCPA-compliant.
data_model.encryption: AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit.

api_design.rate_limiting: Per-IP and per-user limits enforced at gateway

security_and_compliance.authentication: OAuth2 with JWT tokens via Azure AD B2C
security_and_compliance.authorization: RBAC with roles for user, moderator, and admin
security_and_compliance.encryption: AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit
security_and_compliance.secrets_management: Azure Key Vault with automatic rotation
security_and_compliance.privacy: Configurable retention, anonymization, consent management, and user data rights
security_and_compliance.compliance: GDPR/CCPA alignment, DPIA required pre-launch, audit trails maintained
security_and_compliance.incident_response: Detection, containment, notification, and recovery procedures defined

deployment_and_operations.environment: Azure App Service or AKS with managed PostgreSQL and Redis
deployment_and_operations.networking: Azure Front Door with WAF and DDoS protection
deployment_and_operations.ci_cd: GitHub Actions + Azure DevOps with blue-green deployment
deployment_and_operations.autoscaling: Based on CPU, memory, and latency metrics

observability.logging: Structured JSON logs via Azure Monitor
observability.metrics: Latency, throughput, error rates, token usage

cost_and_scaling.cost_controls: Azure Budgets, rate limiting, caching, reserved instances
cost_and_scaling.scaling_strategy: Horizontal scaling for stateless services, vertical for DB
cost_and_scaling.LLM_cost_mitigation: Caching and batching of GPT API calls

phased_implementation.phase_1: Implement core backend, GPT integration, and frontend prototype; establish compliance baseline.
phased_implementation.phase_2: Add authentication, moderation, and configurable retention; deploy MVP.
phased_implementation.phase_3: Enhance scalability, add personalization, multilingual support, and analytics.

development_guidelines.coding_standards: PEP8 for Python, ESLint for JavaScript/TypeScript
development_guidelines.testing: Unit, integration, and security tests in CI/CD
development_guidelines.documentation: API contracts via OpenAPI, architecture diagrams in repo
development_guidelines.security_practices: No hardcoded secrets, regular dependency scanning
development_guidelines.review_process: Mandatory code reviews and security sign-off before release

risks_and_tradeoffs.privacy_vs_personalization: Configurable retention balances compliance and user experience.
risks_and_tradeoffs.scope_vs_timeline: Full multimodal support deferred to later phase to manage cost.
risks_and_tradeoffs.security_vs_usability: Strict authentication may reduce convenience but ensures safety.
risks_and_tradeoffs.cost_vs_scalability: Caching and autoscaling mitigate LLM API cost spikes.

open_questions_resolved.ux_guidelines: WCAG 2.1 compliance and responsive design adopted.
open_questions_resolved.compliance_scope: GDPR and CCPA compliance confirmed with DPIA requirement.

fix_report.action_taken: Revised data retention policy to configurable retention (default 12 months) with user opt-in for longer storage; added anonymization and deletion workflows.
fix_report.expected_outcome: Compliance alignment with GDPR/CCPA; removal of indefinite retention contradiction.

fix_report.action_taken: Defined frontend architecture using React with accessibility and responsive design principles; added UX guidelines and accessibility compliance.
fix_report.expected_outcome: Frontend and UX architecture now complete and implementation-ready.

fix_report.action_taken: Added GDPR/CCPA compliance mapping, DPIA requirement, and consent management workflows.
fix_report.expected_outcome: System now explicitly aligned with compliance frameworks and privacy controls.

fix_report.action_taken: Integrated moderation_service and abuse prevention mechanisms with escalation workflows.
fix_report.expected_outcome: Content moderation and abuse prevention now embedded in architecture.

fix_report.action_taken: Defined OAuth2/JWT-based authentication and RBAC authorization model with Azure AD B2C integration.
fix_report.expected_outcome: Authentication and authorization flows now secure and well-defined.

thinking_summary: The architecture plan consolidates all confirmed requirements and specialist subplans into a coherent, implementation-grade design for a public conversational AI chatbot similar to ChatGPT. The plan resolves compliance and privacy contradictions, defines frontend and UX architecture, and integrates moderation, authentication, and observability. It maintains modularity, security, and scalability while aligning with Azure infrastructure and GDPR/CCPA compliance.
